description: Use this when you have an example of code and want to find similar implementations. Useful for: finding duplicated logic that could be refactored, locating all error handling patterns similar to one you're reviewing, or discovering variations of the same algorithm. Returns code chunks ranked by similarity score.

properties.description: Code snippet to find similar implementations of
properties.name: code

properties.description: Optional repository filter - only search within this repository
properties.name: repository_id

properties.description: Optional branch filter - only search within this branch
properties.name: branch

code.description: Code snippet to find similar implementations of

repository_id.description: Optional repository filter - only search within this repository

branch.description: Optional branch filter - only search within this branch

summary: Find code similar to a given snippet
